text:
switch c {
case black:
	return "black"
case red:
	return "red"
default:
	panic(fmt.Errorf("unknown color %d", c))
}

select {
case <-s.pauseAcceptc: // already unpaused
case <-s.donec:
	s.pauseAcceptMu.Unlock()
	return
default:
	close(s.pauseAcceptc)
}

switch {
case perr == nil:
case errors.Is(perr, flag.ErrHelp):
	fmt.Println(flagsline)
	os.Exit(0)
default:
	os.Exit(2)
}

switch mode {
case 0:
	ev = tracev2.EvUserRegionBegin
case 1:
	ev = tracev2.EvUserRegionEnd
default:
	return
}

switch abi {
case ABI0:
	hash = &ctxt.hash
case ABIInternal:
	hash = &ctxt.funchash
default:
	panic("unknown ABI")
}

switch len(ss) {
case 0:
	return "<unknown>"
case 1:
	return ss[0]
default:
	return "(" + strings.Join(ss, " | ") + ")"
}

switch r.FormValue("mode") {
case "plot":
	mmu.HandlePlot(w, r)
	return
case "details":
	mmu.HandleDetails(w, r)
	return
}

switch n {
case 0:
	return ""
case 1:
	return list[0].obj.name
case 2:
	return list[0].obj.name + " and " + list[1].obj.name
}
